title: Constancy
content:
"You gave me the key of your heart, my love;
        Then why do you make me knock?"
    "Oh, that was yesterday, Saints above!
        And last night, I changed the lock!"
meaning:
John Boyle O'Reilly's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Constancy"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
